subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, thy letter was received, and [brought] glad tidings of the luminosity and spirituality of the beloved ones and handmaidens of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه شما رسید و از مژده نورانیت و روحانیت احباء و اماء رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
